title: Community Moderation Update: Abuse Queue Triage Results
body:
Today's moderation queue triage has been completed:
1. User  has been banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels.
2. User  has been banned for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers.
3. A false positive report against core maintainer has been closed (result of coordinated brigading).
We continue to prioritize community safety and will take swift action against abusive behavior. If you encounter harmful content, please submit a report via the official channels.
